user_query:
I just sent my youngest off to college and I want to pull together a simple, practical starter guide for her using the notes I’ve already collected. Please work entirely within the local workspace (no Internet). Use the provided files under input/ and tools/.

1) Validate and clean the campus resources CSV:
- Run the validator on input/resources.csv using tools/validate_resources.py and capture the full terminal output to output/validator_before.txt.
- Analyze the validator messages and fix the issues by creating output/resources_clean.csv with the same columns (resource_name, category, description, hours, contact) and these rules: correct category values to the validator’s allowed canonical set; normalize category casing; if any required field is missing, set it to "TBD". Do not add or remove columns.
- Re-run the validator on output/resources_clean.csv and save the output to output/validator_after.txt. After your corrections, there should be 0 error(s).

2) Create a structured summary of the cleaned resources:
- From output/resources_clean.csv, generate output/resources_summary.json as a JSON object mapping each category to an array of resource_name strings (e.g., {"Academics": ["Writing Center", ...], ...}).

3) Synthesize a short, local-only guide for my daughter:
- Read input/college_notes.md and output/resources_clean.csv and write output/guide.md with exactly two sections using these headings:
  - Campus Resources to Bookmark: one bullet per resource present in output/resources_clean.csv. For each, include the resource_name, a one-line plain-English description, and the contact. Keep it to one line per bullet.
  - First-Semester Routines: 5–8 bullet points distilled only from ideas in input/college_notes.md (no new advice). Keep them concise.

4) Rewrite my draft message to her:
- Read input/draft_message.txt and write a supportive, clear, and concise version to output/email_to_child.txt. Requirements: maximum ~170 words, warm and encouraging tone without guilt-tripping, include one practical tip that references a relevant resource by name from output/resources_clean.csv or briefly mentions the guide you created, and end with an open invitation to reach out.

Deliverables to create:
- output/validator_before.txt
- output/resources_clean.csv
- output/validator_after.txt
- output/resources_summary.json
- output/guide.md
- output/email_to_child.txt

If any commands produce errors or warnings, explain how you resolved them implicitly through the corrected files (the before/after validator logs will be used for verification). All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
